hero.title: Coaching services that move your next role
hero.subtitle: Three clear packages plus a la carte options for focused help.
hero.metaTitle: Coaching Services That Move Your Next Role | Askia
hero.metaDescription: Outcome‑focused coaching services across resume, LinkedIn, interviews, and offer strategy.

tiers.title: Starter
tiers.body: Core positioning upgrades to get your story and signal right.
tiers.ideal: Best for: early momentum + clean signal

bullets.label: Career consulting
bullets.detailBody: A focused strategy session to align role targets, level, and narrative direction.

bullets.label: Resume revision
bullets.detailBody: We rebuild your resume to read senior, clear, and outcome-driven.

bullets.label: LinkedIn profile revision
bullets.detailBody: Sharper headline, summary, and experience to drive inbound interest.

tiers.title: Land the Job
tiers.body: Everything in Starter plus search execution support to convert faster.
tiers.ideal: Best for: active search + interview momentum

alaCarte.title: A la carte
alaCarte.subtitle: Pick individual services when you only need one specific upgrade.

items.title: Career Consulting
items.body: One focused strategy session to align role, level, and next steps.

items.title: Resume Revision
items.body: Impact‑first resume rebuild with ATS‑ready formatting.

items.title: LinkedIn Profile Revision
items.body: Headline, summary, and experience rewrite for inbound interest.

items.title: Full‑Service Apply to Jobs
items.body: Targeted application support to keep execution consistent.

items.title: Job Search Strategy
items.body: Search plan covering targeting, outreach, and referral motion.

items.title: Continued Support
items.body: Ongoing check‑ins to keep momentum and adjust strategy.

items.question: Which package is right for me?
items.answer: Starter is best for a clean signal upgrade. Land the Job is best if you’re actively searching. Ultimate is best for high‑stakes transitions or tighter timelines.

items.question: Do you work with senior and executive candidates?
items.answer: Yes. We support senior ICs, managers, and leaders. Scope is confirmed on the call.

items.question: How long does the process take?
items.answer: Most packages run 2–6 weeks depending on scope and timing.

items.question: Do you help with interviews and negotiation?
items.answer: Interview preparation is included in Ultimate. Negotiation guidance is included when you’re near offers.

items.question: Can I buy a la carte instead of a package?
items.answer: Yes. If you only need one specific upgrade, choose a la carte and we’ll scope it fast.

cta.title: Not sure which path fits?
cta.body: Book a quick call and we’ll help you choose the best option for your goals.
